$comment: Axona website — Claude Code settings. Commit this; keep secrets in settings.local.json (gitignored). Confirm model name + hook command availability in the 'verify latest' pass.

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'push'*'--force'*|*'push -f'*|*'push'*'origin main'*) echo 'Blocked: no force-push / no direct push to main. Open a PR.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
pnpm exec prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null; pnpm exec eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null; true

hooks.$comment_SubagentStop: SETUP.5 — when the 'builder' subagent finishes, run loop.config.json's id-less hookGate (a fast tsc --noEmit type-check) so a manual Claude Code session is gated like the runner, and fire notify.command if notify.enabled. Optional 'ping' / enforcer; the runner is the authoritative per-story gate. Best-effort and non-blocking (always exits 0).

hooks.command: node -e "const{readFileSync}=require('fs');const{execSync}=require('child_process');let c={};try{c=JSON.parse(readFileSync('loop.config.json','utf8'))}catch{process.exit(0)}const cmd=c.hookGate;if(!cmd){process.exit(0)}let ok=true;try{execSync(cmd,{stdio:'inherit'})}catch{ok=false}const msg=(ok?'GATE PASS':'GATE FAIL')+' — builder subagent';console.error('[builder gate] '+msg);if(c.notify&&c.notify.enabled&&c.notify.command){try{execSync(c.notify.command.replaceAll('<msg>',msg).replaceAll('<status>',ok?'pass':'fail'),{stdio:'inherit'})}catch{}}" 2>&1; true
